title: Heterotrichum macrodon
taxonomy: Heterotrichum macrodon belongs to the plant family Campanulaceae. This family is commonly known as the bellflower family, comprising flowering plants that are native to various parts of the world. The Campanulaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Heterotrichum macrodon being a part of the subfamily Lobelioideae. This subfamily includes a diverse range of plants, many of which are native to tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Heterotrichum macrodon reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Campanulaceae family.
